'''Kaellin III''' was a backwater [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Malenstorr system]]<ref name="GG9" /> in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Corbett sector/Legends|Corbett sector]],<ref name="TEA-OC" /> inhabited by primitive [[Human/Legends|Human]] hunters. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] attacked an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] supply convoy near Kaellin III. An Imperial [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] crashed near a local village. The surviving [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were offered peace by the village elder, but mistook his offer for an attack, and slaughtered the villagers.<ref name="GG9" />

{{Planet-stub}}
